message:
chore: update issue tracker statuses and refresh bd-m8p verification evidence

- Update .beads/issues.jsonl with refined bead descriptions and status
  fields for asupersync migration beads
- Refresh verification_evidence.json and verification_summary.md for
  bd-m8p (section 10.9) to reflect current verification state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
